mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content
is_delete = 0 AND content_status NOT IN ('STATUS_REQUESTED', 'STATUS_REJECTED') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND is_active = #{is_active}
ORDER BY content_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM content
is_delete = 0
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND content_status = #{content_status}
ORDER BY content_id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND role = #{role}
ORDER BY user_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE content SET is_active = CASE WHEN is_active = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END WHERE content_id = #{content_id}
